title: Einkaufs-Experte mit Schwerpunkt Methoden & Prozesse / Projektmanagement (m/w/d)
location: Biberach an der Riß, Baden-Württemberg, Germany

company_info.size_raw: Liebherr Group global machinery manufacturer, 50,000+ employees

required_skills: Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung im Einkauf (procurement specialist experience)
matched_skills: Project management (fundierte Kenntnisse im Projektmanagement — matched via HSBC PMO and Hapag-Lloyd roles)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (matched via both HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd)
International team collaboration (matched via HSBC global programme, multi-market EMEA/APAC coverage)
AI tools usage (ChatGPT/Claude listed in tools)
Structured analytical working style (KPI frameworks, budget dashboards, sprint reporting)
Business degree (Management & Entrepreneurship master — partial degree match)
missing_skills: Source-to-Pay (S2P) process expertise — no procurement/purchasing background at all
Einkauf / procurement specialist experience — core role requirement, completely absent from CV
core_responsibilities: Weiterentwicklung moderner Einkaufsprozesse und Methoden über den gesamten Source-to-Pay-Prozess
Planung, Moderation und Steuerung von Workshops in internationalen und interdisziplinären Teams
Initiierung und Management von Projekten zur Harmonisierung und Optimierung bestehender Einkaufsmethoden
Aktive Mitarbeit an Innovationsinitiativen zur Einführung von AI-Lösungen im Einkauf
Koordination und Kommunikation mit internen Schnittstellen und globalen Teams
cv_highlights: 4+ years project management and PMO experience at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
USD 8M programme budget governance at HSBC
Cross-functional coordination across 6 workstreams and C-suite stakeholders
gaps: CRITICAL: Zero procurement/purchasing (Einkauf) domain experience — this is the core specialisation of the role
SIGNIFICANT: Location mismatch — Biberach an der Riß is ~600km from Lüneburg; relocation would be required
MODERATE: No experience in industrial manufacturing environment (Liebherr context)
MODERATE: Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen (industrial engineering) degree preferred; candidate holds management degrees
recommended_emphasis: Project management and process governance skills transferable to procurement context
Stakeholder coordination and workshop facilitation from HSBC programme management
AI tools experience as differentiator for the AI-in-procurement innovation initiatives
International team collaboration (EMEA/APAC) aligned to global interdisciplinary teams
recommendation: DO NOT APPLY. Match score 22/100. The role requires deep procurement/Einkauf domain expertise and Source-to-Pay process knowledge as its primary qualification — Boru has no procurement background whatsoever. The project management transferable skills are secondary to the procurement specialism. Additionally, the location (Biberach an der Riß, ~600km from Lüneburg) would require full relocation. This is a domain mismatch, not a skills gap that can be bridged by reframing.
